hero.title: We Create Brands That People Love
hero.subtitle: PRISM is a creative studio that blends strategy, design, and storytelling to build unforgettable brand experiences.

about.title: A Studio That Thinks Differently
about.description:
We're a collective of designers, strategists, and storytellers who believe that great brands are built at the intersection of creativity and purpose.

Since 2019, we've helped over 80 brands find their voice, refine their identity, and connect with audiences in meaningful ways. From startups to household names, we bring the same energy and obsession with craft to every project.

items.title: Brand Strategy
items.description: We dig deep into your market, audience, and competitors to craft a strategy that gives your brand an unfair advantage.

items.title: Visual Identity
items.description: Logo, color system, typography, guidelines — everything you need to look consistent and professional everywhere.

items.title: Web Design & Dev
items.description: Websites that convert. We design and build responsive, fast, SEO-optimized sites that reflect your brand perfectly.

items.title: Motion & Video
items.description: From explainer videos to social media reels, we bring your brand to life with motion graphics and video production.

items.title: Social Media
items.description: Content strategy, visual templates, campaign design — we help your brand own its social presence.

items.title: Print & Packaging
items.description: Business cards, brochures, packaging — tactile brand touchpoints designed with the same care as digital.

references.title: Projects We're Proud Of
references.subtitle: A curated selection of our favorite brand transformations

careers.title: Make Work That Matters
careers.subtitle: We're always looking for curious, talented people who care about craft

positions.title: Senior Brand Designer
positions.description: Lead visual identity projects for global clients. 5+ years brand design experience.

positions.title: Motion Designer
positions.description: Create animations, video content, and motion graphics for digital and social campaigns.

positions.title: Frontend Developer
positions.description: Build beautiful, performant websites. React/Next.js experience required.
